market_overview.headline: Market structure shows mixed signals with SPY pulling back to 21W support while QQQ remains bullish but unstacked.
market_overview.detail: 35% of stocks are in Full Bull mode but 26% remain in Full Bear, suggesting selective strength. BTC's Full Bear structure adds risk-off pressure despite 69% risk-on correlation in crypto.

momentum_themes.headline: Sector Momentum Leaders
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominates momentum with memory/storage stocks leading, while financial services show mixed rotation patterns. Energy and mining maintain strong momentum leadership.

sector_analysis.headline: Sector Rotation Snapshot

strongest.note: Perfect bullish alignment with 13.3% average gains above 21W support
Mining complex showing universal strength with solid 11.6% average performance
Tech hardware leading with memory/semiconductor strength despite some weakness

weakest.note: Complete bearish structure across commercial services names
Software and tech services under heavy distribution pressure
Banking and financial services showing mixed signals with more bears than bulls

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from software/services into hardware and commodities. Financial sector remains conflicted with rate uncertainty.

items.text: SPY showing bearish crossover risk with 8W/13W EMAs compressed near bearish cross
QQQ EMAs unstacked with 8W below 13W suggesting tech leadership vulnerability
BTC Full Bear structure at -45.9% from fair value adds macro risk-off pressure
Technology services sector in deep distribution with 90.5% bearish structure
